titleStmt.title: SII 20.257: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 257. (B.K. No. 53 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Mallikārjuna temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1497, Dhātu, Māgha, ba. 30, Monday. The details are irregular. Śaka 1497 corresponded to the cyclic year Yuva, when the details regularly correspond to A.D. 1576, January 30. In the cyclic year Dhātu corresponding to Śaka 1498, the tithi corresponds to A.D. 1577, February 17, when the weekday was Sunday. The former might be the intended date.

The inscription records a gift made by Mahārāja Barigidēva-nāyaka of the village Gauḍagere, situated in Lakshmaṇēśvara-sīme of Huligeṟe-nāḍu which territory had been received by him as Amara-Mokhāsi-Nāyakatana from Alli Edlikhāna-Pātaśāhi. The gift was made over to Nāgaṁṇa-voḍeya for the benefit of the temple of Mallikārjuna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī nama śivāya namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālināhana śaka 1497 neya
dhāta(tu) saṁvatsarada māgha ba 30 sōmavāradalu śrī Allidhavala
pātaśāhivaḍeyaru pruthvirājyaṁ geUtipa kāladallū
lakṣmaṇēśvarada grāmada nairutyada dikinali yihamallikārjuna
dēvarige nāgaṁṇavoḍeyarige śrīma(ṁ)nmahārāja śrī barigidēvanāya
karu koṭa dharmaśāsanā Alli Ēdlikhāna pātaśāhi namage Amara mokhā
si nāyakatanake pālisi yida huligeṟeya nāḍa lakṣmaṇēśvarada sīme
voḷagaṇa gauḍageṟeya grāmavanu mallikārjunadēvara Amrutapaḍige naṁdādīptige
nāgaṁṇavoḍeyarige śivārpaṇa māḍi koṭeU gauḍageṟeya grāmada mūḍalu paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu baḍagalū catussīmege saluva bhūmiyoḍaṇa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa AkṣiṇiRead yoḷagaṇa.
Āgāmi sidhasādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tējasā(ṁ)myavanu voḷagu māḍikoṁḍu malli
kārjunadēvara Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīptiyanu Ācaṁdrārkastāyigaḷāgi yili
ha nāgaṁṇavoḍeyarige śrī ma(ṁ)nmahārāja śrībarigidēvanāyakaru koṭa dharma
śāsana dānapālanayōrmadhyē (.) dānātghrēyōnrupālanaṁ . dānātsargama vāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ svadattādviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradatanrupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . śatruṇāpi krutō dharmmō pālanīyō prayatnataḥ śatrurēva hi śatruśyāt dharma
śatrurna kasyacit . sadatā tanayō bhūmi bra(ṁ)hmadattā sahōdarī A(ṁ)nyadattā ca mā
tā ca tribhirvarjē ta bhūbhujaḥ svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭivaruṣasa
hasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyattē krimi . yī dharmmaṁ Aḷupidare gōmāṁsa
bhakṣaṇe musillamānarige haṁdi māṁsa bhakṣaṇe .
Digital edition of SII 20.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
